description: Furnace making loud banging sound when it kicks on, then shuts off after a few minutes
resolution: Cleaned dirty burners causing delayed ignition. Replaced cracked igniter and tested gas valve.
notes: Access via lockbox, tenant not home.

description: Reported via text: kitchen laminate countertop edge peeling up near sink area, moisture getting underneath surface
resolution: Reglued delaminated section with contact cement. Trimmed and filed edge smooth. Applied edge sealant.

description: Noticed during inspection: front entry door not closing properly, deadbolt not aligning with strike plate Please address soon.
resolution: Adjusted hinge pins and repositioned strike plate. Replaced worn weatherstripping around door frame.

description: Noticed during inspection: water heater making loud popping and rumbling sounds during heating cycles
resolution: Flushed sediment buildup from tank bottom. Replaced corroded anode rod. Sounds eliminated.
notes: Access via lockbox, tenant not home.

description: Noticed during inspection: light switch in hallway feels warm to the touch and makes a slight clicking sound
resolution: Replaced overloaded switch with higher-rated model. Inspected wiring and tightened connections.
notes: Warranty documentation provided for replacement parts.

description: Ceiling fan in bedroom wobbling severely and making rhythmic ticking noise at all speeds
resolution: Balanced fan blades using weight kit. Tightened loose mounting bracket at ceiling junction box.

description: Guest called about: main breaker panel making buzzing sound, concerning electrical humming coming from utility closet
resolution: Tightened loose bus bar connections in main panel. Replaced corroded breaker showing signs of overheating.

description: Paint peeling on bathroom ceiling due to moisture exposure, revealing bare drywall underneath
resolution: Scraped loose paint, primed bare spots with moisture-resistant primer, and applied two coats of semi-gloss.

description: Reported via text: GFCI outlet in kitchen keeps tripping repeatedly, unable to use countertop appliances
resolution: Replaced defective GFCI outlet. Tested circuit load and confirmed wiring connections are secure.
notes: Building access coordinated with tenant schedule.

description: Garbage disposal completely dead, no sound or vibration when switch is activated
resolution: Replaced burned-out garbage disposal motor unit. Installed new 3/4 HP InSinkErator model.

description: GFCI outlet in kitchen keeps tripping repeatedly, unable to use countertop appliances
resolution: Replaced defective GFCI outlet. Tested circuit load and confirmed wiring connections are secure.
notes: Minor additional issues noted for future attention.

description: Guest called about: shower head spraying unevenly with very low water pressure compared to other fixtures Needs attention when convenient.
resolution: Removed and descaled shower head. Replaced corroded shower arm. Water pressure restored to normal.

description: Noticed during inspection: kitchen faucet has developed a persistent slow drip that won't stop even when fully tightened
resolution: Replaced worn cartridge in single-handle kitchen faucet. Tested water pressure and confirmed no additional leaks.
notes: Parts available on truck, completed same visit.

description: Guest called about: air conditioning unit making loud rattling noise and not cooling effectively in warm weather Urgent attention needed.
resolution: Tightened loose compressor mounting bolts. Recharged refrigerant and replaced dirty condenser coil.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Guest called about: no hot water in the unit, water heater pilot light keeps going out repeatedly Has been an issue for a few days.
resolution: Replaced faulty thermocouple on gas water heater. Cleaned burner assembly and tested gas valve operation.
notes: Minor additional issues noted for future attention.

description: Built-in microwave turntable not rotating and food heating unevenly in center only
resolution: Replaced broken turntable motor coupling and drive bushing. Turntable spinning smoothly.

description: Tenant reports: thermostat display is blank and unresponsive, unable to control heating or cooling system
resolution: Replaced dead thermostat batteries and reset programming. Upgraded to smart thermostat per owner request.

description: Bedroom window stuck and won't open, frame appears warped from moisture exposure
resolution: Planed and sanded swollen wood frame. Applied weatherstripping and lubricated track hardware.

description: Noticed during inspection: shower valve handle difficult to turn and temperature fluctuates wildly during use
resolution: Replaced pressure-balancing cartridge in shower valve. Adjusted temperature limit stop.
notes: Minor additional issues noted for future attention.

description: Reported via text: bathroom sink draining extremely slowly, water pooling and taking several minutes to empty
resolution: Snaked drain line and removed hair and soap buildup. Applied enzymatic drain treatment to prevent recurrence.

description: Noticed during inspection: ceiling fan in bedroom wobbling severely and making rhythmic ticking noise at all speeds
resolution: Balanced fan blades using weight kit. Tightened loose mounting bracket at ceiling junction box.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Reported via text: kitchen cabinet door hinge broken, door hanging at angle and won't close properly Please address soon.
resolution: Replaced broken European-style concealed hinge. Drilled new mounting holes and adjusted alignment.
notes: Older fixture replaced with modern equivalent.

description: Guest called about: smoke detector in hallway chirping intermittently despite replacing the battery twice
resolution: Replaced end-of-life smoke detector unit with new 10-year sealed lithium battery model.

description: Tenant reports: bathroom exhaust fan extremely noisy and barely pulling any air, moisture buildup on mirrors and walls
resolution: Replaced worn exhaust fan motor and cleaned duct of lint buildup. Installed new 110 CFM fan unit.
notes: Minor additional issues noted for future attention.

description: Tenant reports: refrigerator not maintaining temperature, food spoiling faster than normal despite thermostat adjustment Needs attention when convenient.
resolution: Cleaned dust-clogged condenser coils and replaced faulty evaporator fan motor. Temperature now stable at 37F.
notes: Warranty documentation provided for replacement parts.

description: Reported via text: dishwasher leaking water from door seal during wash cycle, water pooling on kitchen floor
resolution: Replaced worn door gasket seal and adjusted door latch alignment. No more leaks after multiple test cycles.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Kitchen tile grout cracking and falling out between several floor tiles near dishwasher area
resolution: Removed old grout, cleaned joints, and regrouted with flexible sanded grout. Sealed grout lines.

description: Guest called about: no hot water in the unit, water heater pilot light keeps going out repeatedly
resolution: Replaced faulty thermocouple on gas water heater. Cleaned burner assembly and tested gas valve operation.
notes: Parts available on truck, completed same visit.

description: Kitchen faucet has developed a persistent slow drip that won't stop even when fully tightened
resolution: Replaced worn cartridge in single-handle kitchen faucet. Tested water pressure and confirmed no additional leaks.

description: Main breaker panel making buzzing sound, concerning electrical humming coming from utility closet
resolution: Tightened loose bus bar connections in main panel. Replaced corroded breaker showing signs of overheating.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Refrigerator making loud humming noise that intensifies at night, vibrating against cabinet
resolution: Leveled refrigerator feet and replaced worn compressor mounting grommets. Added anti-vibration pads.
notes: Building access coordinated with tenant schedule.

description: Bedroom outlet sparking briefly when plugging in devices, slight burning smell noticed
resolution: Replaced arc-damaged outlet receptacle. Inspected wire insulation in box and confirmed no fire hazard.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Guest called about: water stain appearing on ceiling below bathroom, indicating possible pipe leak in wall cavity
resolution: Opened access panel and found pinhole leak in copper supply line. Repaired with coupling and soldered joint.

description: Tenant reports: dryer not heating up, clothes coming out still damp after full cycle at high heat setting Needs attention when convenient.
resolution: Cleaned lint-clogged exhaust vent line and replaced burned-out heating element. Full heat restored.

description: Reported via text: visible water leak under kitchen sink cabinet, water dripping from supply line connection
resolution: Tightened compression fitting on hot water supply line. Replaced flexible supply hose showing signs of wear.
notes: Building access coordinated with tenant schedule.

description: Refrigerator not maintaining temperature, food spoiling faster than normal despite thermostat adjustment
resolution: Cleaned dust-clogged condenser coils and replaced faulty evaporator fan motor. Temperature now stable at 37F.
notes: Required follow-up visit for parts pickup.

description: Noticed during inspection: dishwasher leaking water from door seal during wash cycle, water pooling on kitchen floor
resolution: Replaced worn door gasket seal and adjusted door latch alignment. No more leaks after multiple test cycles.
notes: Older fixture replaced with modern equivalent.

description: Circuit breaker for bedroom keeps tripping when using space heater and other devices
resolution: Inspected panel and found overloaded 15A circuit. Installed dedicated 20A circuit for bedroom outlets.

description: Tenant reports: toilet running continuously, can hear water constantly flowing into the bowl
resolution: Replaced faulty flapper valve and adjusted fill valve float height. Toilet now cycles properly.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Noticed during inspection: hardwired smoke detector triggering false alarms during cooking, very sensitive Needs attention when convenient.
resolution: Relocated smoke detector further from kitchen. Installed photoelectric model less prone to cooking triggers.

description: Reported via text: wall heater in living room not igniting, pilot light won't stay lit after multiple attempts
resolution: Replaced faulty thermocouple and cleaned pilot orifice. Tested gas pressure and confirmed safe operation.
notes: Parts available on truck, completed same visit.

description: Noticed during inspection: AC blowing warm air despite being set to cool, thermostat display shows system is running
resolution: Found frozen evaporator coil due to restricted airflow. Replaced clogged filter and cleaned coil.
notes: Required follow-up visit for parts pickup.

description: Tenant reports: hairline crack appearing in living room ceiling, running parallel to the wall joint
resolution: Taped and mudded drywall crack using fiberglass mesh tape. Applied three coats and texture matched.

description: Tenant reports: steam radiator in bedroom leaking water from the valve, hissing sound when heating system runs
resolution: Replaced leaking steam vent and repacked radiator valve stem. Tested system pressure.

description: Tenant reports: refrigerator not maintaining temperature, food spoiling faster than normal despite thermostat adjustment Please address soon.
resolution: Cleaned dust-clogged condenser coils and replaced faulty evaporator fan motor. Temperature now stable at 37F.

description: Noticed during inspection: water dripping from bathroom ceiling light fixture during heavy rain, possible roof or pipe issue
resolution: Traced leak to condensation on cold water pipe above ceiling. Insulated pipe and sealed penetration point.

description: Smoke detector in hallway chirping intermittently despite replacing the battery twice
resolution: Replaced end-of-life smoke detector unit with new 10-year sealed lithium battery model.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Hardwired smoke detector triggering false alarms during cooking, very sensitive
resolution: Relocated smoke detector further from kitchen. Installed photoelectric model less prone to cooking triggers.
notes: Building access coordinated with tenant schedule.

description: Garbage disposal making grinding metal-on-metal sound and not spinning properly
resolution: Removed jammed bottle cap from disposal chamber. Tested motor and reset overload switch.

description: AC blowing warm air despite being set to cool, thermostat display shows system is running
resolution: Found frozen evaporator coil due to restricted airflow. Replaced clogged filter and cleaned coil.

description: Baseboard heater in guest bedroom not producing any heat, thermostat clicks but nothing happens
resolution: Replaced burned-out heating element in electric baseboard unit. Tested thermostat wiring continuity.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Noticed during inspection: living room window has visible crack in glass pane, draft coming through broken seal
resolution: Replaced cracked single-pane glass with new insulated glass unit. Sealed frame and tested for drafts.
notes: Access via lockbox, tenant not home.

description: Noticed during inspection: dishwasher making grinding noise during wash cycle and dishes coming out with residue
resolution: Replaced cracked spray arm and cleaned mineral deposits from wash impeller. Dishes now cleaning properly.
notes: Older fixture replaced with modern equivalent.

description: No heat in the unit despite thermostat being set to 72 degrees, radiators are cold to the touch
resolution: Bled trapped air from radiators and repaired stuck zone valve. Heat restored to all rooms.

description: Reported via text: toilet leaking at the base when flushed, water seeping onto bathroom floor tiles
resolution: Removed toilet, replaced wax ring seal, and reinstalled. Tightened closet bolts and caulked base.
notes: Required follow-up visit for parts pickup.

description: Dimmer switch in dining room not working properly, light stays at full brightness regardless of setting
resolution: Replaced incompatible dimmer switch with LED-compatible model. Calibrated low-end trim for smooth dimming.

description: Oven not reaching set temperature, baking at significantly lower temperature than display indicates
resolution: Replaced faulty oven temperature sensor. Recalibrated thermostat and verified with independent thermometer.
notes: Older fixture replaced with modern equivalent.

description: Reported via text: air conditioning unit making loud rattling noise and not cooling effectively in warm weather
resolution: Tightened loose compressor mounting bolts. Recharged refrigerant and replaced dirty condenser coil.

description: Reported via text: bathroom faucet dripping constantly, water stain forming on the vanity counter below
resolution: Installed new ceramic disc cartridge and replaced corroded aerator. Cleaned mineral deposits from valve seat.
notes: Required follow-up visit for parts pickup.

resolution: Used cable machine to clear grease blockage in kitchen drain trap. Replaced corroded P-trap assembly.

resolution: Replaced arc-damaged outlet receptacle. Inspected wire insulation in box and confirmed no fire hazard.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Noticed during inspection: dryer not heating up, clothes coming out still damp after full cycle at high heat setting
resolution: Cleaned lint-clogged exhaust vent line and replaced burned-out heating element. Full heat restored.

description: Tenant reports: toilet leaking at the base when flushed, water seeping onto bathroom floor tiles Urgent attention needed.
resolution: Removed toilet, replaced wax ring seal, and reinstalled. Tightened closet bolts and caulked base.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Kitchen laminate countertop edge peeling up near sink area, moisture getting underneath surface
resolution: Reglued delaminated section with contact cement. Trimmed and filed edge smooth. Applied edge sealant.
notes: Parts available on truck, completed same visit.

description: Tenant reports: paint peeling on bathroom ceiling due to moisture exposure, revealing bare drywall underneath
resolution: Scraped loose paint, primed bare spots with moisture-resistant primer, and applied two coats of semi-gloss.
notes: Minor additional issues noted for future attention.

description: Noticed during inspection: washing machine displaying error code and refusing to start any cycle, door lock light blinking
resolution: Reset control board and replaced defective door lock assembly. All cycles now functioning normally.
notes: Parts available on truck, completed same visit.

description: Strong musty smell coming from HVAC vents when system first turns on each day
resolution: Professionally cleaned ductwork and evaporator coil. Replaced HVAC filter and treated mold in drip pan.
notes: Building access coordinated with tenant schedule.

description: Shower head spraying unevenly with very low water pressure compared to other fixtures
resolution: Removed and descaled shower head. Replaced corroded shower arm. Water pressure restored to normal.
notes: Older fixture replaced with modern equivalent.

description: Reported via text: water stain on bathroom ceiling growing larger, drywall feels soft and spongy to the touch
resolution: Replaced water-damaged drywall section after leak repair. Primed with stain blocker and painted to match.

description: Noticed during inspection: front entry door not closing properly, deadbolt not aligning with strike plate
resolution: Adjusted hinge pins and repositioned strike plate. Replaced worn weatherstripping around door frame.

description: Tenant reports: hardwired smoke detector triggering false alarms during cooking, very sensitive
resolution: Relocated smoke detector further from kitchen. Installed photoelectric model less prone to cooking triggers.
notes: Older fixture replaced with modern equivalent.

description: Reported via text: built-in microwave turntable not rotating and food heating unevenly in center only
resolution: Replaced broken turntable motor coupling and drive bushing. Turntable spinning smoothly.

description: Tenant reports: closet bifold door off track and hanging at an angle, difficult to open and close
resolution: Replaced broken pivot bracket and realigned track hardware. Both door panels now fold smoothly.
notes: Warranty documentation provided for replacement parts.

description: Water stain appearing on ceiling below bathroom, indicating possible pipe leak in wall cavity
resolution: Opened access panel and found pinhole leak in copper supply line. Repaired with coupling and soldered joint.

description: Noticed during inspection: bathroom vanity cabinet shelf collapsed under weight, bottom of cabinet water damaged Needs attention when convenient.
resolution: Replaced water-damaged shelf and cabinet bottom panel with moisture-resistant material. Reinforced supports.

description: Tenant reports: dishwasher making grinding noise during wash cycle and dishes coming out with residue Please address soon.
resolution: Replaced cracked spray arm and cleaned mineral deposits from wash impeller. Dishes now cleaning properly.

description: Guest called about: water stain appearing on ceiling below bathroom, indicating possible pipe leak in wall cavity
resolution: Opened access panel and found pinhole leak in copper supply line. Repaired with coupling and soldered joint.

description: Guest called about: strong musty smell coming from HVAC vents when system first turns on each day
resolution: Professionally cleaned ductwork and evaporator coil. Replaced HVAC filter and treated mold in drip pan.

description: Overhead kitchen light flickering constantly, getting worse over the past week
resolution: Replaced corroded wire connectors in ceiling junction box. Installed new LED light fixture.

description: Toilet running continuously, can hear water constantly flowing into the bowl
resolution: Replaced faulty flapper valve and adjusted fill valve float height. Toilet now cycles properly.
notes: Warranty documentation provided for replacement parts.

description: Guest called about: bedroom window stuck and won't open, frame appears warped from moisture exposure
resolution: Planed and sanded swollen wood frame. Applied weatherstripping and lubricated track hardware.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Window AC unit leaking water onto interior floor, condensate dripping from front panel
resolution: Leveled unit and cleared clogged condensate drain channel. Replaced cracked drain pan.

description: Guest called about: bathroom vanity light fixture buzzing loudly and one socket not working at all Please address soon.
resolution: Replaced faulty ballast and rewired vanity light fixture. All sockets now operational.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Guest called about: hot water runs out within five minutes of shower use, not reaching adequate temperature Needs attention when convenient.
resolution: Adjusted thermostat setting and replaced lower heating element. Insulated exposed hot water pipes.

description: Guest called about: garbage disposal completely dead, no sound or vibration when switch is activated Urgent attention needed.
resolution: Replaced burned-out garbage disposal motor unit. Installed new 3/4 HP InSinkErator model.
notes: Warranty documentation provided for replacement parts.

description: Guest called about: closet bifold door off track and hanging at an angle, difficult to open and close Has been an issue for a few days.
resolution: Replaced broken pivot bracket and realigned track hardware. Both door panels now fold smoothly.
notes: Access via lockbox, tenant not home.

description: Water dripping from bathroom ceiling light fixture during heavy rain, possible roof or pipe issue
resolution: Traced leak to condensation on cold water pipe above ceiling. Insulated pipe and sealed penetration point.

description: Thermostat display is blank and unresponsive, unable to control heating or cooling system
resolution: Replaced dead thermostat batteries and reset programming. Upgraded to smart thermostat per owner request.

description: Noticed during inspection: kitchen faucet has developed a persistent slow drip that won't stop even when fully tightened Please address soon.
resolution: Replaced worn cartridge in single-handle kitchen faucet. Tested water pressure and confirmed no additional leaks.
notes: Required follow-up visit for parts pickup.

description: Guest called about: shower head spraying unevenly with very low water pressure compared to other fixtures
resolution: Removed and descaled shower head. Replaced corroded shower arm. Water pressure restored to normal.

description: Noticed during inspection: hardwood floor boards creaking loudly in hallway, noticeable squeaking with every step
resolution: Secured loose subfloor with screws from below. Applied talc powder between boards to reduce friction.
notes: Required follow-up visit for parts pickup.

description: Stairway handrail loose and wobbling, mounting brackets pulling away from drywall
resolution: Installed heavy-duty wall anchors and new mounting brackets. Secured handrail firmly with lag bolts into studs.
notes: Older fixture replaced with modern equivalent.

description: Living room wall outlet not providing power, tested with multiple devices and none work
resolution: Found loose wire connection at outlet terminal. Secured wiring and replaced damaged outlet receptacle.
notes: Minor additional issues noted for future attention.

description: Thermostat reading shows 68 degrees but unit feels noticeably colder, suspected calibration issue
resolution: Recalibrated thermostat sensor. Found and sealed air leak near thermostat location affecting readings.

description: Tenant reports: water dripping from bathroom ceiling light fixture during heavy rain, possible roof or pipe issue
resolution: Traced leak to condensation on cold water pipe above ceiling. Insulated pipe and sealed penetration point.
notes: Building access coordinated with tenant schedule.

description: Guest called about: water heater making loud popping and rumbling sounds during heating cycles
resolution: Flushed sediment buildup from tank bottom. Replaced corroded anode rod. Sounds eliminated.
notes: Building access coordinated with tenant schedule.

description: Noticed during inspection: kitchen faucet has developed a persistent slow drip that won't stop even when fully tightened Needs attention when convenient.
resolution: Replaced worn cartridge in single-handle kitchen faucet. Tested water pressure and confirmed no additional leaks.
notes: Required follow-up visit for parts pickup.

description: Tenant reports: refrigerator making loud humming noise that intensifies at night, vibrating against cabinet
resolution: Leveled refrigerator feet and replaced worn compressor mounting grommets. Added anti-vibration pads.

description: Noticed during inspection: bedroom outlet sparking briefly when plugging in devices, slight burning smell noticed Needs attention when convenient.
resolution: Replaced arc-damaged outlet receptacle. Inspected wire insulation in box and confirmed no fire hazard.

description: Noticed during inspection: bathroom faucet dripping constantly, water stain forming on the vanity counter below Has been an issue for a few days.
resolution: Installed new ceramic disc cartridge and replaced corroded aerator. Cleaned mineral deposits from valve seat.

description: Guest called about: living room window has visible crack in glass pane, draft coming through broken seal
resolution: Replaced cracked single-pane glass with new insulated glass unit. Sealed frame and tested for drafts.

description: Kitchen cabinet door hinge broken, door hanging at angle and won't close properly
resolution: Replaced broken European-style concealed hinge. Drilled new mounting holes and adjusted alignment.

description: Noticed during inspection: bedroom window stuck and won't open, frame appears warped from moisture exposure
resolution: Planed and sanded swollen wood frame. Applied weatherstripping and lubricated track hardware.

description: Toilet leaking at the base when flushed, water seeping onto bathroom floor tiles
resolution: Removed toilet, replaced wax ring seal, and reinstalled. Tightened closet bolts and caulked base.

description: Tenant reports: stairway handrail loose and wobbling, mounting brackets pulling away from drywall Urgent attention needed.
resolution: Installed heavy-duty wall anchors and new mounting brackets. Secured handrail firmly with lag bolts into studs.

description: Noticed during inspection: toilet running continuously, can hear water constantly flowing into the bowl Urgent attention needed.
resolution: Replaced faulty flapper valve and adjusted fill valve float height. Toilet now cycles properly.
notes: Vendor arrived on time and completed efficiently.

description: Noticed during inspection: garbage disposal jammed and humming but not grinding, reset button does not fix the issue
resolution: Used Allen wrench to free jammed flywheel. Removed broken glass shard from grinding chamber.
notes: Building access coordinated with tenant schedule.

description: Guest called about: hairline crack appearing in living room ceiling, running parallel to the wall joint
resolution: Taped and mudded drywall crack using fiberglass mesh tape. Applied three coats and texture matched.

description: Tenant reports: thermostat reading shows 68 degrees but unit feels noticeably colder, suspected calibration issue
resolution: Recalibrated thermostat sensor. Found and sealed air leak near thermostat location affecting readings.

description: Noticed during inspection: window caulking cracked around bedroom window frame, noticeable cold draft during windy days
resolution: Removed old exterior caulk, cleaned joints, and applied new polyurethane sealant. Draft eliminated.

description: Guest called about: oven not reaching set temperature, baking at significantly lower temperature than display indicates
resolution: Replaced faulty oven temperature sensor. Recalibrated thermostat and verified with independent thermometer.
notes: Parts available on truck, completed same visit.

description: Noticed during inspection: hardwood floor boards creaking loudly in hallway, noticeable squeaking with every step
resolution: Secured loose subfloor with screws from below. Applied talc powder between boards to reduce friction.
